rulings.Case Title: ROBERT A RATTI ET AL VS. RONALD J RATTI SR ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Awarding Plaintiffs Costs And Attorneys Fees
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 11, 2020 line 1. PLAINTIFF ROBERT RATTI, JOAN RATTI Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Awarding Plaintiffs Costs And Attorneys Fees is continued to January 12, 2021 on Court's own motion. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: MARTIN RYAN VS. 1001 CALIFORNIA STREET CONDOMINIUM HOMEOWNERS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Special Interrogatories And For A Terminating Sanction, Or In The Alternative, Issue And Or Evidence Sanctions Against Plaintiffs, And For A Monetary Sanction Against Plaintiffs And Their Counsel
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 11, 2020 line 2. DEFENDANT PACIFIC UNION INTERNATIONAL, INC., JOANNE STEIN Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Special Interrogatories And For A Terminating Sanction, Or In The Alternative, Issue And Or Evidence Sanctions Against Plaintiffs, And For A Monetary Sanction Against Plaintiffs And Their Counsel is GRANTED as follows: evidentiary sanctions are granted precluding Plaintiff from presenting evidence or witnesses not identified in their opposition papers (as to any allegations present in the current operative complaint). Sanctions granted against Plaintiff's counsel in the amount of $2,090 to be paid within 10 days of notice of entry of order. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: MARTIN RYAN VS. 1001 CALIFORNIA STREET CONDOMINIUM HOMEOWNERS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Reconsideration And For Permission To File Their 5th Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 11, 2020 line 2. PLAINTIFF MARTIN RYAN, CLAIRE RYAN Notice Of Motion For Reconsideration And For Permission To File Their 5th Amended Complaint is OFF CALENDAR, insufficient notice. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: SYLVIA GILLESPIE VS. KIMO INC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Defendant Kimo, Inc. Dba Nai Northern California To Strike Portions Of First Amended Complaint; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 11, 2020 line 3. DEFENDANT KIMO INC Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Defendant Kimo, Inc. Dba Nai Northern California To Strike Portions Of First Amended Complaint is GRANTED with final leave to amend as previously ruled, i.e. equitable indemnity in paragraph 36 of the First Amended Complaint is stricken with leave to amend for plaintiff to allege a separate cause of action and facts supporting alternative remedy of equitable indemnity. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: PARKMERCED OWNER, LLC VS. MARSHALL BLACKSHER ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Leave To File Amended Answer
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 11, 2020 line 10. DEFENDANT MARSHALL BLACKSHER Motion For Leave To File Amended Answer is continued to December 17, 2020. By no later than December 14, 2020 Defendant to file a Proposed Amended Answer with properly alleged affirmative defenses, i.e. brief facts to support each element of each affirmative defense. =(501/CFH)
